texto: So, in other words, we tore our world apart to get rid of these gods. And they were very bad gods, right?' I say, just to be clear. 'Not just messing around and having funsies with their adoring followers but truly wicked and vile?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Liz de Jager que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “So, in other words, we tore our world apart to get rid of these gods. And they were very bad gods…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, gods, other, com foco em reflexao.
